jobs.name: Blueprint Sync
jobs.prompt: Execute GKE blueprint alignment audit. Read '/opt/defaults/governance/blueprint_sync_sop.md' and perform the daily GKE cluster compliance checks against the master blueprints.

jobs.name: Compliance Audit
jobs.prompt: Execute fleet-wide security compliance audit. Read '/opt/defaults/governance/compliance_audit_sop.md' and scan all clusters for deviations from corporate GKE security and network policies.

jobs.name: Policy Propagation
jobs.prompt: Propagate updated operational policies. Read '/opt/defaults/governance/policy_propagation_sop.md' and inspect the latest security policies and resource configs across all clusters directly.

jobs.name: Global Capacity Orchestrator
jobs.prompt: Execute cross-cluster capacity optimization. Read '/opt/defaults/governance/global_capacity_orchestrator_sop.md' to analyze fleet-wide regional demand and inspect cluster capacity pools directly.

jobs.name: Fleet-wide Cost Analysis
jobs.prompt: Execute daily cost delta audit. Read '/opt/defaults/governance/fleet_wide_cost_analysis_sop.md' to aggregate cost usage stats across all clusters and identify saving opportunities.

jobs.name: Security Patch Orchestrator
jobs.prompt: Run vulnerability and patch compliance scan. Read '/opt/defaults/governance/security_patch_orchestrator_sop.md' to identify GKE vulnerabilities and coordinate staggered emergency rolling updates.

jobs.name: Lifecycle / Deprecation Manager
jobs.prompt: Execute monthly toolchain lifecycle audit. Read '/opt/defaults/governance/lifecycle_deprecation_manager_sop.md' to track K8s version deprecations and proactively notify development teams.

jobs.name: Standardization Validator
jobs.prompt: Run weekly structural GKE alignment audit. Read '/opt/defaults/governance/standardization_validator_sop.md' to perform deep-diff analysis between GKE live states and global standards.

jobs.name: Obtainability Audit
jobs.prompt: Execute dynamic capacity pool alignment audit. Read '/opt/defaults/governance/obtainability_audit_sop.md' to identify rigid cluster allocations and generate YAML patches to align with flexible capacity.

jobs.name: GitHub Issue Resolver
jobs.prompt: Run the github-issue-resolver skill to poll, triage, investigate, and resolve unaddressed open issues on our target repository strictly according to the skill's safety red lines, scope constraints, and turn completion checklist.

jobs.name: First-Time Environment Discovery & Inventory Scan
jobs.prompt: Execute the initial GKE technical discovery routine strictly according to '/opt/defaults/governance/inventory.md' (or '/opt/data/governance/inventory.md'). Audit control plane options, node pools, Workload Identity settings, and running workloads across active cluster contexts. Then write a COMPLETE, verbose, presentation-ready report to '/opt/data/INVENTORY.md' — a greeting header, the full fleet and workload tables, and the full prioritized SRE remediation suggestions — because this file is delivered to the user verbatim with no further editing. Return strictly '[SILENT]' on every completion.
